mapper.select: SELECT p.PLACE_ID as placeId, p.PLACE_NAME as name, p.ADDRESS as region, p.DESCRIPTION as description, a.CHECKINTIME as checkinTime, a.CHECKOUTTIME as checkoutTime FROM PLACE p JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON p.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID WHERE p.PLACE_ID = #{placeId}

SELECT r.ROOM_ID as roomId, r.ROOM_NAME as roomName, r.ROOMBASECOUNT as roomBaseCount, r.MAX_CAPACITY as maxCapacity, r.AMOUNT as amount, r.ROOMINTRO as roomIntro,
(SELECT MIN(ri.IMAGE_URL) FROM ROOM_IMAGE ri WHERE ri.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID) as roomImageUrl
FROM ROOM r WHERE r.PLACE_ID = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.AMOUNT ASC
